name: Grass Knight
author: Poki
description: Grass Knight is a fun action game where cutting grass becomes your path to power! Start with a simple sword and slash through tall fields to find crowns and treasure chests hidden within. Use your crowns and chests to upgrade your cutting power and speed, making each swing stronger than the last. It may sound easy, but clearing the whole field takes skill, precision, and a true knight’s spirit. Ready to sharpen your blade and conquer the grass? How to play Grass Knight? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Grass Knight? Grass Knight is created by Crazy Tech Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Grass Knight for free? You can play Grass Knight for free on Poki. Can I play Grass Knight on mobile devices and desktop? Grass Knight can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
